hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.env'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": ".env dosyasina dokunma! Secrets korunuyor."}'; fi

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$'; then cd /Users/sidarhalman/Documents/MyDesktop/freelancer/clients/rewshen/focus-game/focus-game && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
osascript -e 'tell app "System Events" to display notification "Claude isi bitirdi!" with title "Focus Game"' 2>/dev/null || true
